subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Sacred Threshold! These letters which thou sendest are, verily, a source of spiritual joy and delight, for [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس این مکاتیبی که میفرستی جمیعا سبب روح و ریحانست زیرا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @firmness in the Covenant, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
